examples: At Gawker, it is not uncommon for editors to stay on the job for just a year.
One hacker - identified as IAMDGKZ1 - told Gawker they had information on a well-known film director.
Even if you weren't affected by the Gawker breach, now is a good time to ensure you're truly safe online.
The Gawker reporter did not pay for it and the man with the phone took off.
Also Thursday, the news site Gawker also ran a story about the video.
